mapper.sql: CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_borrow_record r WHERE r.book_id = b.id AND r.status = 0 ) THEN '借阅中' ELSE '在库' END AS borrow_status
mapper.select:
SELECT b.id, b.book_name, b.author, b.isbn, b.publish_house, b.price, b.stock, b.category_id, b.summary, b.cover_url, b.create_time, b.update_time,
FROM t_book b ORDER BY b.id ASC

SELECT b.id, b.book_name, b.author, b.isbn, b.publish_house, b.price, b.stock, b.category_id, b.summary, b.cover_url, b.create_time, b.update_time,
FROM t_book b WHERE b.id = #{id}

SELECT b.id, b.book_name, b.author, b.isbn, b.publish_house, b.price, b.stock, b.category_id, b.summary, b.cover_url, b.create_time, b.update_time,
FROM t_book b WHERE b.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY b.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_book (book_name, author, isbn, publish_house, price, stock, category_id, summary, cover_url, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{bookName}, #{author}, #{isbn}, #{publishHouse}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{categoryId}, #{summary}, #{coverUrl}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE t_book SET book_name = #{bookName}, author = #{author}, isbn = #{isbn}, publish_house = #{publishHouse}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, category_id = #{categoryId}, summary = #{summary}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
